title: Tragacantha minutissima
intro: Tragacantha minutissima, also known as Astragalus gummifer, is a species of flowering plant in the legume family, Fabaceae. It is valued for its potential health benefits, including its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. The bioactive constituents of Tragacantha minutissima include flavonoids, saponins, and polysaccharides, which contribute to its medicinal properties. In traditional medicine, Tragacantha minutissima is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is used to treat a range of ailments, including respiratory infections and digestive issues.
